title: Phakama urges safer, united initiation season
description: EASTERN CAPE NEWS - Phakama Eastern Cape...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - Phakama Eastern Cape calls upon families, community elders and traditional leaders to work hand in hand as prospective initiates prepare to embark on their sacred rite of passage into manhood this summer initiation season.","html":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - Phakama Eastern Cape calls upon families, community elders and traditional leaders to work hand in hand as prospective initiates prepare to embark on their sacred rite of passage into manhood this summer initiation season."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"What should be a period of joy, pride and cultural celebration has, too often, been overshadowed by sorrow and tragedy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each year, families across the Eastern Cape are left mourning the preventable loss of young lives, a painful reality that undermines the dignity and sanctity of “ulwaluko”.","html":"Each year, families across the Eastern Cape are left mourning the preventable loss of young lives, a painful reality that undermines the dignity and sanctity of “ulwaluko”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The tradition of “ulwaluko” is deeply rooted in family, mentorship and communal guidance.","html":"The tradition of “ulwaluko” is deeply rooted in family, mentorship and communal guidance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Phakama Eastern Cape calls on elders and custodians of culture to ensure that traditional practices are conducted with integrity, vigilance, and respect for both heritage and human life.","html":"Phakama Eastern Cape calls on elders and custodians of culture to ensure that traditional practices are conducted with integrity, vigilance, and respect for both heritage and human life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cultural preservation and safety must co-exist, so that the youths return home as men, ready to be integrated into society with pride and purpose.","html":"Cultural preservation and safety must co-exist, so that the youths return home as men, ready to be integrated into society with pride and purpose."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We further urge communities to extend support to single-parent households, particularly mothers who may be anxious during this period,\" Phakama Eastern Cape says.","html":"\"We further urge communities to extend support to single-parent households, particularly mothers who may be anxious during this period,\" Phakama Eastern Cape says."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"No parent should feel excluded or powerless in matters concerning their child’s safety and well-being. Every boy deserves responsible guidance, informed care, and oversight throughout this process.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The organisation appeals to young men to engage openly with their families and elders before undertaking this important step.","html":"The organisation appeals to young men to engage openly with their families and elders before undertaking this important step."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The road to manhood is not one to be walked alone or in secrecy. It is a communal journey grounded in preparation, protection and unity.","html":"The road to manhood is not one to be walked alone or in secrecy. It is a communal journey grounded in preparation, protection and unity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Phakama Eastern Cape wishes all initiates a safe passage and a dignified return to their families and communities.","html":"Phakama Eastern Cape wishes all initiates a safe passage and a dignified return to their families and communities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Phakama urges safer, united initiation season
